title: Shulker Utilities
description: Shulker Utilities is a vanilla+ mod that enhances shulker boxes.
body:
# Shulker Utilities Shulker utilities is a Vanilla+ mod, that adds and enhances the use of shulker boxes. _They are already awesome, but can be just a bit more awesome_ ;) At it's current stage it's a very simple mod, that currently only allows for assembly/disassembly of a shulker in-world.

The idea originated from [gigaherz] posting about it in [MMD]. [MMD]: https://discord.mcmoddev.com [gigaherz]: https://www.curseforge.com/members/gigaherz
